text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Fool! Blockhead! Nincompoop! Oh, how
embarrassing...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, but I wish to be left alone for now.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I can't possibly look you in the eye after what I've
done!

text_block_list.name: Student Council Member
text_block_list.text: I wonder why she took that so badly?

text_block_list.name: Student Council Member
text_block_list.text: All she did was flub a joke...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Argh! I was so proud of that one! I just thought of
it last night too...
